----- Original Message ----
From: "barak@barak-associates.com" <barak@barak-associates.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, February 16, 2007 6:38:04 PM
Subject: Re: Fwd: producer list from yoed

Dear Jeff

Send him my best regards. I like him very much. A brilliant Jewish mind. Unfortunately I have to leave to Iowa + Utah on Tuesday morning. I'll be back in NY from. 7am to 1230am on Friday Feb 23. probably we can meet by then.  

Best

Ehud Barak 

Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless
